---
title: "Menelai Sphæricorum libri III. Quos olim, collatis MSS. Hebræis & Arabicis, typis exprimendos curavit"
---

## Menelai Sphæricorum libri III. Quos olim, collatis MSS. Hebræis & Arabicis, typis exprimendos curavit

**Author:** George Costard
**Date:** 1758
**Imprint:** Oxford:

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
